translationText: Noon. By the pen, and by what they inscribe.
By the grace of your Lord, you are not insane.
In fact, you will have a reward that will never end.
And you are of a great moral character.
You will see, and they will see.
Which of you is the afflicted.

arabicText: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ
translationText: Your Lord knows best who has strayed from His path, and He knows best the well-guided.
So do not obey the deniers.
They would like you to compromise, so they would compromise.
And do not obey any vile swearer.
Backbiter, spreader of slander.
Preventer of good, transgressor, sinner.
Rude and fake besides.
Just because he has money and children.

arabicText: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
translationText: When Our Verses are recited to him, he says, "Myths of the ancients!"
We will brand him on the muzzle.

arabicText: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَٰهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَآ أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا۟ لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
translationText: We tested them, as We tested the owners of the garden, when they vowed to harvest it in the morning.
Without any reservation.

arabicText: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ
translationText: But a calamity from your Lord went around it while they slept.
And in the morning it was as if picked.
In the morning, they called to one another.

arabicText: أَنِ ٱغْدُوا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰرِمِينَ
translationText: "Go early to your plantation, if you are going to harvest."
So off they went, murmuring to one another.

arabicText: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌۭ
translationText: "No poor person is to enter it upon you today."
And early they went, resolved in intent.
But when they saw it, they said, "We were wrong.
We are now deprived."

arabicText: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
translationText: The most reasonable of them said, "Did I not say to you, 'if only you would glorify?'"

arabicText: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
translationText: They said, "Glory to our Lord-We were indeed in the wrong."
Then they turned to one another, blaming one another.
They said, "Woe to us-we were indeed domineering.

arabicText: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًۭا مِّنْهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ
translationText: Perhaps our Lord will give us a better substitute for it. We are turning to our Lord."

arabicText: كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ ۚ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
translationText: Such is the punishment; but the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew.

arabicText: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
translationText: For the righteous are Gardens of Delight with their Lord.
Shall We treat the Muslims like the villains?
What is the matter with you? How do you judge?
Or do you have a scripture in which you study.
Wherein there is whatever you choose?

arabicText: أَمْ لَكُمْ أَيْمَٰنٌ عَلَيْنَا بَٰلِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ ۙ إِنَّ لَكُمْ لَمَا تَحْكُمُونَ
translationText: Or do you have oaths from Us, binding until the Day of Resurrection, that you will have whatever you demand?
Ask them, which of them will guarantee that.

arabicText: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَٰدِقِينَ
translationText: Or do they have partners? Then let them produce their partners, if they are truthful.

arabicText: يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍۢ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
translationText: On the Day when the Shin will be exposed, and they will be called to bow down, but they will be unable.

arabicText: خَٰشِعَةً أَبْصَٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌۭ ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُوا۟ يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَٰلِمُونَ
translationText: Their eyes subdued, shame will cover them. They were invited to bow down when they were sound.

arabicText: فَذَرْنِى وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ ۖ سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
translationText: So leave Me to those who reject this discourse; We will proceed against them gradually, from where they do not know.
And I will give them respite. My plan is firm.

arabicText: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًۭا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍۢ مُّثْقَلُونَ
translationText: Or do you ask them for a fee, so they are burdened with debt?
Or do they know the future, and so they write it down?

arabicText: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌۭ
translationText: So wait patiently for the Decision of your Lord, and do not be like the Fellow of the Fish who cried out in despair.

arabicText: لَّوْلَآ أَن تَدَٰرَكَهُۥ نِعْمَةٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌۭ
translationText: Were it not for his Lord's favor that reached him, he would have been thrown into the wilderness, fully despised.
But his Lord chose him, and made him one of the righteous.

arabicText: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَٰرِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا۟ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجْنُونٌۭ
translationText: Those who disbelieve almost stab you with their glances when they hear the message, and say, "He is crazy!"
But it is no less than a reminder to all the Worlds.
